sql:
SELECT 
                        campaign_name, 
                        ad_group_name,
                        targeting,
                        match_type,
                        'SP' as type, 
                        SUM(spend) as spend, 
                        SUM(total_sales) as sales, 
                        SUM(clicks) as clicks, 
                        SUM(impressions) as impressions, 
                        SUM(total_orders) as orders
                      FROM amazon_advertising_sp 
                      WHERE customer_id = 1 AND (1=1) 
                      AND report_date BETWEEN ? AND ? 
                      AND report_type IN ('targeting', 'campaign', 'general')
                      GROUP BY campaign_name, ad_group_name, targeting, match_type
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT 
                        campaign_name, 
                        ad_group_name,
                        targeting,
                        match_type,
                        'SB' as type, 
                        SUM(spend) as spend, 
                        SUM(total_sales) as sales, 
                        SUM(clicks) as clicks, 
                        SUM(impressions) as impressions, 
                        SUM(total_orders) as orders
                      FROM amazon_advertising_sb 
                      WHERE customer_id = 1 AND (1=1) 
                      AND report_date BETWEEN ? AND ? 
                      AND report_type IN ('targeting', 'campaign', 'general')
                      GROUP BY campaign_name, ad_group_name, targeting, match_type
                      UNION ALL
                      SELECT 
                        campaign_name, 
                        ad_group_name,
                        targeting,
                        match_type,
                        'SD' as type, 
                        SUM(spend) as spend, 
                        SUM(total_sales) as sales, 
                        SUM(clicks) as clicks, 
                        SUM(impressions) as impressions, 
                        SUM(total_orders) as orders
                      FROM amazon_advertising_sd 
                      WHERE customer_id = 1 AND (1=1) 
                      AND report_date BETWEEN ? AND ? 
                      AND report_type IN ('targeting', 'campaign', 'general')
                      GROUP BY campaign_name, ad_group_name, targeting, match_type
                      ORDER BY spend DESC LIMIT 1000
